title: Fix: HTTP header injection vulnerability
original_text: Fixed HTTP header injection vulnerability. Implemented header sanitization for user input. Added header validation and encoding. Implemented secure header generation. Added header injection detection. Result: HTTP header injection vulnerability fixed.
expected_subject: fix(security): fix HTTP header injection vulnerability
expected_body_lines: - Implement header sanitization for user input
- Validation: HTTP header injection vulnerability fixed
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): fix HTTP header injection vulnerability"
